ns0:entry.ns0:title: [rust] always-further/nono
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/always-further/nono
Language: rust
Kernel-enforced agent sandbox. Capability-based isolation with secure key management, atomic rollback, cryptographic immutable audit chain of provenance. Run your agents in a zero-trust environment.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: [html] nirholas/XActions
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/nirholas/XActions
Language: html
⚡ The Complete X/Twitter Automation Toolkit — Scrapers, MCP server for AI agents (Claude/GPT), CLI, browser scripts. No API fees. Open source. Unfollow people who don't follow back. Monitor real-time analytics. Auto follow, like, comment, scrape, without API.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: [astro] ibelick/ui-skills
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/ibelick/ui-skills
Language: astro
A growing set of skills to polish interfaces built by agents.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: [go] QuantumNous/new-api
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/QuantumNous/new-api
Language: go
A unified AI model hub for aggregation & distribution. It supports cross-converting various LLMs into OpenAI-compatible, Claude-compatible, or Gemini-compatible formats. A centralized gateway for personal and enterprise model management. 🍥

ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/pierotofy/OpenSplat
Language: c++
Production-grade 3D gaussian splatting with CPU/GPU support for Windows, Mac and Linux 🚀

ns0:entry.ns0:title: [emacs-lisp] eval-exec/neomacs
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/eval-exec/neomacs
Language: emacs-lisp
NEO Emacs: A GPU-powered Emacs written in Rust with a modern display engine. Aiming for modern design/multi-threaded Elisp, 10x performance and 100% Emacs compatibility. 🚀 Inline 4K images/4K videos/WPEWebKit using GPU acceleration, DMA-BUF, ZERO-COPY. Rich animation effects support.

ns0:entry.ns0:content:

Language: shell
A public place for all platform sample projects.

ns0:entry.ns0:content:

Language: shell

ns0:entry.ns0:title: [shell] marcusquinn/aidevops
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/marcusquinn/aidevops
Language: shell
Vibe-Coding is easy. DevOps is hard. OpenCode & Git token-efficient AI agent automation for your app, business, and personal development. Opinionated tools, services, CLI & API stack for speed, security, and 24/7 results. Open-source first. SOTA everything. Try it on your repos to see the magic.
